business.name: Renee's wallcoverings plus LLC
business.tagline: Meticulous work, every wall, every room

hero.headline: The painter Toledo parents call first
hero.subheadline: Quick, professional work that looks perfect when you walk back in the room.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & wallcovering services
services_section.subheading: Every room handled with the same attention to detail

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, and trim painted with precision. Clean lines, smooth finish, zero mess left behind.

services.title: Nursery & Kids' Rooms
services.description: Safe, kid-friendly paints applied while working around nap schedules and family routines.

services.title: Wallcovering Installation
services.description: Professional wallpaper and wall covering application for accent walls and full rooms.

services.title: Trim & Detail Work
services.description: Window trim, ceiling lines, and detailed woodwork painted to perfection.

about.heading: One person, meticulous work
about.body: Renee handles every Toledo project personally. You get the same careful attention whether it's one nursery or your whole house.

reviews.name: Brody S.
reviews.text: Renee did our nursery, master bath, living room, and dining room — everything looks great. Quick, professional, and super friendly.

reviews.name: Lisa S.
reviews.text: Professional, delivers on commitments, and does meticulous work. Perfect results on window trim and ceiling work.

reviews.name: Kayla H.
reviews.text: Great to work with and does excellent, quality work. Painted most areas of our rental property with fantastic results.

cta.heading: Ready for that perfect paint job?
cta.body: Free quotes on all interior painting and wallcovering projects. Same meticulous attention to every room.
